channel.title: Supplier Performance Group
channel.description: Recent content on Supplier Performance Group

item.title: Dealing With Reps
item.description:
Many small-to-midsize manufacturers have one or two dedicated sales team members, but depend on independent manufacturers reps to sell products out in the field.

Dealing with these Reps is an art and a skill in-and-of itself.

They are knowledgeable, and very independent. But interesting them in your line, getting them to talk about your line and your products during a customer visit, when they represent any number of suppliers, can be a challenge.

item.title: Yet Another Page
item.description: I think i found another way to add a page to my Hugo site today. If so, this is a thrilling discovery.

item.title: What is the Supplier Performance Group about?
item.description:
The Supplier Performance Group

The Supplier Performance Group exists to help Suppliers in the Industrial and Construction marketplaces thrive and prosper. We write about all aspects of the supplier experience — working with GPOs and buying groups, managing independent manufacturer’s reps, trade shows, sales force structure, channel management, and upstream supplier relationships.

item.title: About
item.description:
The Supplier Performance Group

The Supplier Performance Group exists to help Suppliers in the Industrial and Construction marketplaces thrive and prosper. We write about all aspects of the supplier experience — working with GPOs and buying groups, managing independent manufacturer’s reps, trade shows, sales force structure, channel management, and upstream supplier relationships.
